name: Multi-Universe
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>多元宇宙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マルチユニバース</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Activate only if you do not control a face-up card in your Field Zone. You can target 1 Field Spell that is banished or in either GY; destroy this card, and if you do, place that targeted card face-up in your Field Zone. You can only use this effect of "Multi-Universe" once per turn. If a card(s) in the Field Zone would be destroyed by card effect, you can banish this card from your GY instead.
eff: Activate only if you do not control a face-up card in your Field Zone. You can target 1 Field Spell that is banished or in either GY; destroy this card, and if you do, place that targeted card face-up in your Field Zone. You can only use this effect of "Multi-Universe" once per turn. If a card(s) in the Field Zone would be destroyed by card effect, you can banish this card from your GY instead.

action: Places cards from your Graveyard in your Field Zone
Places cards from your opponent's Graveyard in your Field Zone
Places your banished cards in your Field Zone
Places your opponent's banished cards in your Field Zone
mst: Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
